title: Croatian Citrusy Juicy Pork Cutlets
description: A tender and juicy Croatian-inspired dish featuring pork cutlets, citrus, and caramelized onions. Perfect for a solo dinner.

ingredients.name: Pork Cutlets (4)
ingredients.notes: Thinly sliced pork shoulder or loin

instructions: Season the pork cutlets with salt, black pepper, and herbs.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork cutlets for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until browned.
Transfer the pork cutlets to a plate and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add the sliced onions to the skillet.
Cook the onions for 5-7 minutes, or until caramelized and golden brown.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in lemon juice and orange juice, cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
Return the pork cutlets to the skillet and spoon some of the caramelized onion mixture over the top.
Simmer the pork cutlets for 5-7 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve hot and garnish with fresh herbs.
